text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho throws a tantrum at training and
says that she doesn't want to run, but I get the
impression she's actually putting on a
performance to test me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she really wasn't interested in running today,
she wouldn't have shown up to training at all.
Knowing there must be a reason she's here, I sit
quietly and wait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some time, Sweep Tosho speaks her mind.
"Just believe in me. Listen to what I think. Don't
try and force me to do what you think's right!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering me trustworthy, she opens up about
where she wants to race next. And so, with the
Oka Sho as our next destination, her search for
racing magic begins anew.
